summary: Frontend UI testing completed for P0 UI/UX updates. Tested all 10 features: compact calendar, completed task styling, edit dialog behavior, checkbox toggle, and task sorting.
passed_tests: 1. Calendar in ПОДІЇ column is compact (16px cell size verified)
2. Completed tasks do NOT have line-through/strikethrough text
3. Completed task checkboxes have outline style (transparent background: rgba(0,0,0,0), gray border: rgb(156,163,175))
4. Clicking standalone task in КАРОЛІНА opens edit dialog directly (not intermediate popup)
5. Edit dialog shows 'завдання для [Name]' with assignee dropdown (Кася/Кароліна/Во options verified)
6. Edit dialog has ВИДАЛИТИ (delete) and ЗБЕРЕГТИ (save) buttons with correct labels
7. Clicking event-based task in КАСЯ opens event detail popup (correct behavior)
8. Completed tasks are semi-transparent (opacity: 0.4 verified via computed style)
9. Completed tasks move to bottom of today's list (verified in all 3 columns: КАСЯ, КАРОЛІНА, ВО)
10. Color picker in edit dialog shows 4 small round circles (16px buttons verified)
critical_code_review_comments: SMMTaskItem component correctly applies opacity-40 class to completed tasks (line 437)
task-checkbox.checked CSS correctly uses transparent background with gray border (no filled style)
TeamColumn component correctly passes onTaskEdit prop for standalone task editing
Edit dialog correctly implements assignee dropdown with Кася/Кароліна/Во options
Today section tasks are sorted by completion status: [...tasks.today].sort((a, b) => (a.completed ? 1 : 0) - (b.completed ? 1 : 0))
Color picker uses 16px round buttons for 4 colors: black, red, purple, emerald
seed_data_creation: None - used existing events and tasks
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 UI/UX features tested and passing: 1) Compact calendar with 16px cells in ПОДІЇ column. 2) Completed tasks have opacity-40 (semi-transparent) with no line-through. 3) Checked checkboxes are outline style (transparent bg, gray border). 4) Standalone tasks open edit dialog with assignee dropdown. 5) Event-based tasks open event detail popup. 6) Edit dialog has ВИДАЛИТИ/ЗБЕРЕГТИ buttons and 4 color circles. 7) Completed tasks sorted to bottom in today section.
